Class ImportFilterManager

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jailer.importfilter.ImportFilterManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
ImportFilterTransformer
public abstract class ImportFilterManager extends Object implements ImportFilterTransformer
Manages filtering of data during import.
Author:
Ralf Wisser

  • Constructor Details

    • ImportFilterManager

      public ImportFilterManager(Session localSession, OutputStreamWriter result, Set<Table> progress, Quoting targetQuoting, ExecutionContext executionContext) throws FileNotFoundException, SQLException
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      localSession - the local database session, or null to create one on demand
      result - writer to write DDL results into
      progress - the set of tables that are part of the export
      targetQuoting - quoting helper for the target database
      executionContext - the execution context
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException
      SQLException

  • Method Details

    • createMappingTables

      public void createMappingTables(DBMS configuration, OutputStreamWriter result) throws IOException, SQLException
      Creates the DDL for the mapping tables.
      Throws:
      IOException
      SQLException

    • dropMappingTables

      public void dropMappingTables(OutputStreamWriter result) throws IOException, SQLException
      Creates the DROP-statements for the mapping tables.
      Throws:
      IOException
      SQLException

    • sync

      protected abstract void sync(OutputStreamWriter result) throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException

    • shutDown

      public void shutDown() throws SQLException
      Shuts down the local database, releasing all resources.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • fillAndWriteMappingTables

      public void fillAndWriteMappingTables(EntityGraph entityGraph, JobManager jobManager, OutputStreamWriter dmlResultWriter, int numberOfEntities, Session targetSession, DBMS targetDBMSConfiguration) throws CancellationException, SQLException
      Inserts the values of columns with non-derived import-filters into the local database and writes the mapping table DML to the given writer.
      Parameters:
      entityGraph - the entity graph to read unfiltered columns from
      jobManager - the job manager used to execute jobs in parallel
      dmlResultWriter - writer for the DML result output
      numberOfEntities - the number of entities to process
      targetSession - the session for the target database
      targetDBMSConfiguration - the target DBMS configuration
      Throws:
      CancellationException
      SQLException

    • transform

      public String transform(Column column, String oldValue)
      Description copied from interface: ImportFilterTransformer
      Transforms a column with an import-Filter into an SQL-expression.
      Specified by:
      transform in interface ImportFilterTransformer
      Parameters:
      column - the column whose import filter is to be applied
      oldValue - the original SQL literal value of the column
      Returns:
      the transformed SQL expression
